name: Chicken with Forty Cloves of Garlic
recipeIngredient: 8 Chicken legs (cut into Drumsticks and thighs)
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the chicken in cold water and pat dry with paper towels.
2. Coat all chicken pieces evenly with olive oil.
3. Place celery slices at the bottom of a heavy 6-quart casserole dish with a tight-fitting cover.
4. Add parsley and tarragon to the casserole.
5. Arrange chicken pieces on top of the vegetables.
6. Sprinkle vermouth, salt, pepper, and nutmeg over the chicken.
7. Pour remaining oil from the plate into the casserole.
8. Toss in all garlic cloves.
9. Sprinkle with additional salt.
10. Cover with aluminum foil to seal tightly.
11. Bake at 375°F for 1 1/2 hours without removing the lid.
12. Serve with hot toast, thin slices of French bread, or pumpernickel spread with softened garlic cloves.
